title: Bernokl's GitHub Pages
description: THis is a page Mr Matt and Berno is nerding out on

sections.title: This is our first box
sections.content: This is a simple website that updates automatically when you change the JSON content.
sections.tooltip: Hover over images to see tooltips! This image is just a placeholder - replace the URL with your own image.

sections.title: This is our second box
sections.content: Edit the content/pages.json file to update this website. When you commit and push, GitHub Actions will automatically rebuild and deploy the site.
sections.contentTooltip: This tooltip appears when you hover over the text content!
sections.tooltip: You can add tooltips to images by including a 'tooltip' field in the JSON.

sections.title: Confused Man
sections.content: This section features a confused man image. To use your own image, right-click on an image from Google search results, select 'Copy image address', and paste that URL here.
sections.tooltip: Replace this placeholder with a direct image URL. Right-click any image in Google search results and choose 'Copy image address' to get the direct URL.
